error_signature: simultaneous output from sub-workflow for success and failure
title: Sub-workflow returns both success and error outputs
symptom: The sub-workflow is producing simultaneous outputs indicating both success and failure, leading to confusion in the workflow execution.
applies_when: Node settings include 'always Output data' and 'continue on error'
not_this_if: Sub-workflow has a clear single path without conflicting output settings
root_cause: The issue arises when a node is configured to always output data while also set to continue on error. This creates a situation where both success and error outputs can be emitted simultaneously, causing ambiguity in the workflow's execution flow.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the node in the sub-workflow.
Remove the 'always Output data' option or adjust the error handling settings to ensure only one output path is followed.
Ensure that the sub-workflow can only reach an end once, either by catching errors or converting them to a clear output.
agent_instruction: Adjust the node settings in the sub-workflow to prevent simultaneous success and error outputs.
